name_cn:
✈️Top-tier Original✨💞💞 【BAGATELLE Handbag】 m46301 46002 Pink (Silk Screen)
This Bagatelle handbag is crafted from Monogram Empreinte grained leather, featuring a light and elegant large embossed pattern that highlights the curved silhouette. Cleverly using a detachable and adjustable shoulder strap, you can switch between single shoulder, elbow carry, and crossbody at will.
Size: 24 x 18 x 7 cm MXP-7517009
